title: crepis tenerrima
intro: Crepis tenerrima, also known as the slender hawk's beard or baby's breath dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Crepis tenerrima has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a sought-after ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Crepis tenerrima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for convenient and effective administration of its medicinal properties.
